name: superdesign
tagline: ClawHub skill (192★): expert front-end guidelines for building modern, polished user interfaces.
verdict: Its own frontmatter name doesn't match its directory and collides with another skill's name, which is confusing to route correctly. It also gives no guidance on when not to use it despite claiming to handle 'any user interface', and it loads an unpinned CDN script.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' guidance; 'any user interface' invites misfire.
Frontmatter name is 'frontend-design' but the directory is 'superdesign/' — a name mismatch that also collides with a different skill.
Loads lucide@latest from unpkg (unpinned CDN dependency).
